name: Cosmo: execute complete append + qa whole-body parse causes unclearable finalize deadlock
description: complete APPENDS the completion summary and qa parses the whole body, so trip-wire tokens from a dirty first complete can never be cleared on re-finalize — a hard deadlock that forces an operator force-close.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: execute complete appends each completion summary, while qa/review parses the whole page body, so trip-wire text from an earlier dirty finalize remains visible after a clean re-finalize. Variants: (1) first completion summary dirty then second clean must clear the item; (2) multiple historical summaries must not be cumulatively parsed as current truth; (3) designated/latest summary parsing must still catch trip-wire text in the active summary. Regression test: add or update Cosmo execute/qa tests so re-finalizing with a clean latest summary passes while a dirty latest summary still fails.
